products.sensor_type: 1/1.8 inch CMOS (zoom camera, 8MP); 1/2 inch CMOS (wide-angle, 48MP); 640x512 uncooled VOx (dual thermal sensors)
products.control_protocol: Autel proprietary (designed for Autel Alpha and Titan platforms)
products.price_source: Sold as standalone gimbal and in bundles with Autel Alpha drone. Gimbal-only pricing available from resellers (Volatus Drones, B&H Photo, DSLRPros, Drone Nerds) but not publicly listed on most sites; contact for quote. Full Alpha + L35T bundles available from multiple authorized dealers.
notable_features: 5-in-1 sensor system: zoom camera, wide-angle camera, dual thermal cameras, laser rangefinder
Ultra-sensitive starlight night vision (4K 30fps in low light)
Designed as standalone swappable gimbal for Autel Alpha platform
products.near_miss_reason: Weight of gimbal alone not publicly listed but Autel Alpha with battery and gimbal is 6250g total, suggesting gimbal is likely 1500-2500g. Designed for large enterprise drone platform. Price of full system likely exceeds $10,000.
